mapper.select: SELECT CHAT_ROOM_NO, TITLE, USER_NAME, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_ROOM_JOIN CRJ WHERE CRJ.CHAT_ROOM_NO = CJ.CHAT_ROOM_NO ) AS CNT FROM CHAT_ROOM CJ LEFT JOIN MEMBER USING(USER_NO) WHERE CJ.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY CHAT_ROOM_NO DESC
SELECT MESSAGE, USER_NAME, CREATE_DATE, CM_NO, USER_NO FROM CHAT_MESSAGE LEFT JOIN MEMBER USING(USER_NO) WHERE CHAT_ROOM_NO = #{chatRoomNo} ORDER BY CM_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGE VALUES ( SEQ_CM_NO.NEXTVAL, #{message}, DEFAULT, #{chatRoomNo}, #{userNo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CHAT_ROOM SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE CHAT_ROOM_NO = #{chatRoomNo}
